editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
Treat macOS code signing as a major user-facing milestone for this day.

pinnedHighlights.text: Native macOS code signing for effortless installs
pinnedHighlights.reason: Major trust and installability milestone for the day rollup.

editorialNotes: Code signing is a big deal. Keep it near the top even after smaller follow-up builds.

rollup.summary: Native macOS code signing for effortless installs
whatsNew: Native macOS code signing for effortless installs
Add a checked-in release note workflow with draft generation, human approval, and a publish gate before tagging
Add macOS codesigning to release pipeline
Validate required Apple signing and notarization secrets in the release workflow before macOS builds start
Pass the Apple signing and notarization environment variables through to tauri-action
fixes: Stop Freed Desktop feed cards from eagerly rendering remote media previews
This simplifies the public legal surface and moves the desktop license assent to the place where it actually matters, the first launch of Freed Desktop
Remove the standalone Experimental Risk page and fold that language into Terms of Use and the Desktop EULA
Remove Desktop EULA assent from the website download modal, which now covers only Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
Keep the Desktop EULA in the desktop first-run gate, and update shared legal metadata and provider risk links to match
Update legal docs and Phase 1 docs so the documented flow matches the shipped flow
